prestazioni: Garrett GT2260S turbocharger upgrade (replacing the stock IHI RHF3-P turbo) for the T270HP 1.4L MultiAir Turbo (engine code: 312 A1.000) with a custom 0.63 A/R turbine housing, paired with a Forge Motorsport 3-port boost controller and a custom 3-inch downpipe featuring a GESI 304 stainless steel cat-delete section for optimized spool and 280-300whp potential on 98 RON fuel

Brembo GT 6-piston front brake kit (380mm discs) with Ferodo DS2500 pads and Goodridge 6AN braided stainless steel brake lines, complemented by a custom ABS recalibration via Alientech KESSv2 to retain OEM stability control under aggressive track use

Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (part #AB695RT) with 8-position adjustable damping, custom spring rates (8kg/mm front, 10kg/mm rear), and spherical bearing top mounts from SuperPro (part #SPF695-001) for precise camber and caster adjustment, paired with a Whiteline front sway bar (24mm adjustable) and rear subframe reinforcement plates from Tarox
estetica: Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (AB695-specific) with carbon fiber front fenders, rear quarter panels, and a ducktail spoiler, finished in a custom matte Grigio Titanio with gloss black accents, including extended wheel arches to accommodate 18x9.5 ET20 front and 18x10.5 ET25 rear wheels

Recaro Pole Position Carbon Kevlar seats (AB695-specific mounting brackets) with Schroth Profi II 6-point harnesses, paired with a custom roll cage from Custom Cages (FIA-spec, T45 steel, bolt-in design) and a MOMO Mod.73 steering wheel with a quick-release hub (NRG part #50011)

Akrapović Evolution Line titanium exhaust system (part #AB695-EVO) with dual 76mm outlets, carbon fiber tips, and a custom heat wrap (DEI Titanium) for the downpipe, complemented by a custom carbon fiber engine cover (Seibon) and a relocated battery (Braille B3122) to the trunk for optimized weight distribution
